title: Rpetti
compiled_truth: Rpetti is an external contact at [Ladwp](companies/ladwp). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-10-25), Rpetti sent 2 and received 159 emails, totalling 161 interactions. Top correspondents: [Flu](people/flu-ladwp) (1), [Smasud](people/smasud-ladwp) (1), [Gbeltr](people/gbeltr-ladwp) (1).
